title: Oura 健康 AI 临床负责人 Tanvi Jayaraman 谈新模型与健康功能
full_text:
Jun 11th, 2026
Oura's Jayaraman on New Model, Health Features
Tanvi Jayaraman, Health AI Clinical Lead at Oura, discusses the smart ring maker's new model and its new wellness capabilities that aim at detecting signs of high blood pressure and sleep apnea. She speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.
